AFTER THE ARGUMENT, PETITIONER WILLIAM SETZLER'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. EACH SIDE IS TO SUBMIT AN ORDER AND STATEMENT OF DECISION FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION. AT 11:45 A.M. MATTER ARGUED. RECESS AT 1:05 P.M. TO RECONVENE AT 2:05 P.M. AT 2:15 P.M., ARGUMENT RESUMED. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 8, 2005 FOR SUBMISSION OF PROPOSED ORDERS AND STATEMENTS OF DECISION; NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY. Fees are imposed pursuant to GC 68086ff and CRC 892.
